description: The SphereEmitter component is used to create particles in a particle system (See Photon Dust). This Emitter emits particles from a sphere shape.

fields.Radius: The radius of the sphere shape this is emitting from.
fields.DirectionMode: How particles should be oriented when emitting from the Sphere shape.
fields.DirectionReferencePoint: The point to use as a reference point when orienting particles upon emission.
